aligned_lyrics.text: Your name in the dust there
But I still feel every rise
Radio playing like it’s calling me home
Same brand you used to buy
Like you’re waiting on the line
While the chorus drifts back in
But I taste you on my skin
But I still feel every rise
Radio playing like it’s calling me home
[soft vocoder haze swells under the vocal]

words.text: [soft vocoder haze swells under the vocal]

aligned_lyrics.text: My tongue trips over every year
But I still feel every rise
Radio playing like it’s calling me home
